use_cases: Full-screen hero background for landing pages creating premium visual impact
Animated background for gaming interfaces and creative portfolios
Interactive visual showcase for SaaS products and developer tools
Immersive landing page hero for media and entertainment brands
ai_summary: A WebGL-powered liquid metal vortex shader effect featuring animated metallic fluid patterns with mouse-reactive interactivity. This component renders a full-screen canvas with a custom fragment shader creating glossy, reflective liquid metal visuals that respond to cursor movement. Ideal for premium hero sections and landing pages where a modern, high-end visual impact is needed.
